title: Malty Chewy Chinese Curry Wrap
description: A flavorful, energizing, and FODMAP-friendly Chinese dish featuring Massaman curry paste in a chewy ssam-wrap.
instructions: Heat coconut oil in a large pan over medium-high heat.
Add diced scallions and cook until translucent.
Add diced chicken breast and cook until browned.
Stir in Massaman curry paste and cook for 1 minute.
Add green curry paste and stir for 30 seconds.
Pour in coconut milk and bring to a simmer.
Reduce heat to low and let sauce simmer for 5 minutes.
Warm the ssam wheat wraps according to package instructions.
Assemble wraps by spooning curry sauce over the chicken and garnishing with cilantro.
Assemble wraps by spooning curry sauce over the chicken and garnishing with cilantro.
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
